ha9781a95g1503g4ebdga87fg4235bd3f1384: That's far enough. What's your business down here? Answer honestly, and maybe we'll kill you clean.
hb59df8d1g5a19g4ab2ga226g58ecca495e14: Hold on. That's the lass who saved us from the gnolls. Let her in.
h726481e6g7058g47ffg88d9g7c145714480e: Hold on. That's the lad who saved us from the gnolls. Let him in.
h8faca85cg8f70g43c3g9aa7g2c0672fc2678: You revealed our location? That tongue gets any looser, Rugan, I'll cut it out.
hcad751f2g9cb6g41c1g8d27g873913e4e491: Come down, then. Seems you're a friend of the family.
he9bae5abg5f03g4b1fg8a0dgad3f07e97bfe: Woah, hold your arrows! This is Rugan's saviour, I'll bet. He told us all about you.
hbb7668d9g17f6g4fb6g8770gf71184413cab: Come on in, then. Any friend of Rugan's is a friend of the family.
h80d3e528g4545g448fg9d08g4d0d45f5b4a3: Your lookout already tried - and failed.
ha8605282g57c2g416dg9cd7gac920ee8eb59: I won't. Last time - what's your business here?

h97ae236dgc7cbg462cg89f7g86bb68b08aa6: Then your answer decides his fate as well as your own - so make it good.
h62269713g4089g4e24g816cgad832d6f21ea: I know the pass-phrase: 'Little serpent, long shadow'.
hf6a2c99egc686g49d1g97f9gaa23ec5bca5d: That just tells me you know our codes, not why you're here. I won't ask again.
hfd583c0dg545bg40eeg9d66gabd3c92337a6: Your colleague gave me a pass-phrase: 'Little serpent, long shadow'.
h54eddb55g9253g41c4ga7fbgbecf969eaf60: That just tells me you've met my people - not why you're here in their stead.
hd2d82141gc185g41degb747g683c13ffe2ca: I saved them on the road. They'll be along soon.
haafece37g60eeg47eag9ecbg1d818e5eb053: Then I'll welcome you as a friend - if and when they get here.
h659cbc15g6f02g4abfg8b37g6e87b487a0a0: Until then, I suggest you keep your distance.
hedd4d661gf16fg4630gaa27gb31d74ab9531: I saved Rugan on the road. He'll be along soon.
h09e70076ga240g44acg917dg2c347f3baac9: Hrast. Then you're the least of my problems. Count your blessings - and bugger off.
h18655cebg20f1g4dfeg9395gf0fc3985a10d: They won't be coming back - but I know what became of their cargo.
hb6285485gd87dg41f5gb326g70568470aedc: Really? That information would be worth quite a bit to me. If you're telling the truth.
h5dd86c65gb2e3g4c10ga1d0g1dbf49e4b2e7: Fear not, you can trust me. Your friends did.
h4141bd7eg4f1dg4c42g9279ge3088b047f62: Hrast - lads, we've got a visitor! Arm the traps!
he1455a51gabbbg4fe5ga70ag7d8fecc14838: Hrast - lads, we've got a visitor! Arm yourselves!
h89f8f85fg789ag4323ga57agdde77b6e8f4c: You know I can still see you, right?
h9f5c8c24gc115g491dgb520g9f9d82bc94cd: I'm coming in. If you want to die over it, that's your business.
h497fbd2cg3227g41a1gbfcbged3085d72c5e: Well aren't you a cold one - making threats like you can back 'em up.
h3a2bd8f6g4bfbg469fgaa9agb38905615b04: Perhaps you are more useful to me alive.
he72aa7bdgaa75g445cg9b0ega9ce27bb2b0e: Keep coming - see who it is gets buried down here.
h19ddf511g33d6g46d9g95aag9959aab98f94: I truly don't want to fight - just to trade.
h782e5f27gd1c8g42edgbdd5ge0cea950a121: I'm coming in. If you want to die over it, that's your business.
ha2bf36a8gadc0g41e1g80edgc7f255aecc3c: Stand down. I go where I please.
h08ee195ag5249g450ag9f00g2c3a02479f59: Still... takes steel to swagger in here. If you're half as tough as you think you are, I might have a job for you.
h9ffe374fg901bg4a4bgb410g0067822f7d80: Do you now? Well, we were just getting ready to leave, so be my guest.
h65d1b2e3g7d2dg4f35gb484g772d33ed2123: I don't want trouble - I just want to trade.

haa8343eeg3acfg402eg8e26g698cc4bbf4d2: I don't feel like trading today.
h2e9a6d47g13d9g44f1gbe57g9467914ecbcf: I suggest you turn around - we're closing the shop for the day.

h07b87c42g7f39g4e6fgb011g64a7729319b9: I suggest you turn around - we're closing the shop for the day.
he5a2fdfegd717g4727gb7dagb37c81402e66: Where in the hells is Rugan. I need that cargo.

h66195a95g63d4g4fbdg8742g469f9765f27d: Still, I can look past it - if you have what I need. Come down.

hcaad79a1g3844g49d9gba67g9a0dd3b0637f: Here's a thought for you - turn around.

h32b5c770gfcfcg4dfdg9c8eg9797d8003f0f: You're ugly enough - no need to be a liar on top. Now toddle off back to whatever hole you came from.
